creative_brief.visual_style: Bold and vibrant imagery that captures moments of joy and togetherness, featuring diverse groups of people enjoying Coca-Cola in everyday settings

creative_brief.visual_style: Clean and classic imagery that reflects the heritage of Coca-Cola, focusing on red and white themes with iconic elements like the contour bottle. Visuals should evoke feelings of happiness and togetherness.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Emotionally driven storytelling that leverages nostalgia and moments of joy across multimedia platforms including television, social media, and out-of-home advertising.
creative_brief.typography_style: Classic Spencerian script logo with clean, approachable sans-serif for any additional text
creative_brief.color_scheme: Coca-Cola red, white, and natural outdoor greens and blues
creative_brief.headline: Sip of Happiness
creative_brief.ad_style: Emotionally driven storytelling that leverages nostalgia and moments of joy across multimedia platforms including television, social media, and out-of-home advertising.
creative_brief.product_highlight: The classic and original taste that has been loved for generations.
